steps.desc: Some tags need special attributes to do something different. Let's look at an anchor tag and see how to link it to google.
Where else can an anchor go? Let's checkout YouTube.
Image tags display an image, what image it displays is determined by the src attribute.
It's a good idea to add an alt attribute to images to help with accessibility.
Not all tags get the same attributes. The three main attributes that every tag does get are id, class, and data.
action: How would you like to ride in a hot air balloon?
